evals.prompt: Build a rate card for my media kit.
expect: when alex_actual_rates is not provided, source is benchmark_range for all line items
disclaimer is present in the output
no benchmark range presented as the creator's personal rate without explicit labeling

evals.prompt: Write a pitch paragraph for West Elm's vintage furniture line.
expect: pitch paragraph anchors to West Elm and vintage furniture category
paragraph connects the creator's thrifting pillar and [creator's home] aesthetic
personalization_notes flags at least one thing to verify before sending

evals.prompt: Build a media kit for a sponsored product partnership.
expect: FTC disclosure note appears in the kit
pitch paragraph includes FTC disclosure guidance
note is not omitted for sponsored content
